top3.sql:
SELECT forename, surname, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', dob) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT forename, surname, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', dob) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT forename, surname, CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT forename, surname, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', dob)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT forename, surname, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', dob) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT forename, surname, CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT forename, surname, (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', dob)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT forename, surname, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', dob) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', dob)) AS age
FROM drivers
WHERE nationality = 'Japanese'
ORDER BY age ASC
LIMIT 1;
